name: ui-skills
description: A Codex UI craft plugin combining design direction, official skill patterns, accessibility, motion judgment, and polish rules.

interface.shortDescription: Design, build, review, and polish frontend UI with strong taste and hard checks.
interface.longDescription: Combines a focused set of UI skill ideas into a Codex-ready plugin: Impeccable-style product/brand register, Anthropic official frontend-design patterns, User Interface Wiki heuristics, make-interfaces-feel-better detail polish, and Designer Skills design-system vocabulary. The earlier UI/UX Pro Max, Taste, and ui-skills dependencies were removed to keep the guidance sharper and less prescriptive.
defaultPrompt: Redesign this screen with stronger hierarchy.
Audit this UI for accessibility and polish.
